<?php namespace Hamcrest; /* Copyright (c) 2009 hamcrest.org */ /** * The ability of an object to describe itself. */ interface SelfDescribing { /** * Generates a description of the object. The description may be part * of a description of a larger object of which this is just a component, * so it should be worded appropriately. * * @param \Hamcrest\Description $description * The description to be built or appended to. */ public function describeTo(Description $description); }
